engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is evaluating a THING — a web app that generates mockups — via feature grids (device/social/print/product mockups), pricing, API and plugin pitches, and proof. Not selling a person's expertise (trust) and the mockup grids showcase product capability, not a creator's portfolio.

goal.one_action: create a free account / launch the mockup editor (top-of-funnel self-serve signup)

structure.archetype_note: Classic self-serve SaaS marketing shell (home + pricing + contact) fronting an in-app editor; subscription checkout + login portal live behind the signup CTA.

mapped.observed_as: Create inspirational visuals and product mockups without a hassle
Visualize your design / Create a design
Technology / Social media / Print / Products / Logo / Image effects
Publish your content directly to social media
Stop wasting hours on visuals / Prices (Starter/Professional/Team)
Design your way to the top (free eBook lead magnet)
Bring ideas to life with Instant Mockups (Mockup API) / Turn Your Print Website into an Automated Store (POD plugin)
Have questions or feedback? Write us a message
Products / Use Cases / Customers / ModifAI / Company

unmapped.observed: Technology / Social media / Print / Products / Image effects category grids linking into browsable template libraries
unmapped.why_no_fit: These are entry tiles into a large browsable template catalog (15071 templates), not a static features section nor a purchasable product catalog — closest canonical is features but under-captures the browsable-library nature

proposed_new.name: membership-checkout
proposed_new.evidence: commerce.cart_or_checkout=true with recurring subscription tiers (Starter free / Professional $8.25-15.83 mo / Team $37.50 mo billed yearly) purchased on-site — on-site recurring plan configurator + checkout, matching the registry's membership-checkout.

confidence.why: fetch_quality=full; three pages captured with sections, CTAs, forms, pricing and proof. Pricing discrepancy across pages noted as A/B/stale but does not affect classification.

gap_findings: Site is a self-serve SaaS with an in-app editor, recurring subscription checkout, and login portal — the marketing shell's job is a single signup action (fits thing/form), but the full product transacts recurring plans (membership-checkout) which the closed vocab cannot express.

Homepage category grids act as entry points into a very large browsable template library (15071 templates) — 'catalog' is the nearest closed-vocab fit but it implies purchasable goods, not a free tool's template gallery; a browsable-template-library notion is under-served.
